title: Neuroloma longicarpum
intro: Neuroloma longicarpum, also known as Longicarpus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Neuroloma longicarpum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Neuroloma longicarpum is often used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including arthritis and other inflammatory disorders.
